name: Guinaifen
desc: A performance artist visiting the Xianzhou Luofu — in other words, a street performer.\nShe's chasing a new life on the Luofu when not concerned with food and shelter.

1.name: Slurping Noodles During Handstand
1.desc: When Skill is used, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to reduce the attacked target enemy's Effect RES by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

2.name: Brushing Teeth While Whistling
2.desc: When an enemy target is being Burned, the DMG multiplier of the Burn status applied by her Basic ATK or Skill increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Smashing Boulder on Chest
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Blocking Pike with Neck
4.desc: Every time the Burn status inflicted by Guinaifen causes DMG, Guinaifen regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

5.name: Swallowing Sword to Stomach
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Catching Bullet with Hands
6.desc: Increases the stackable Firekiss count by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

121001.name: Standing Ovation
121001.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Guinaifen's ATK to one designated enemy.
121001.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

121002.name: Blazing Welcome
121002.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Guinaifen's ATK to one designated enemy and Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Guinaifen's ATK to any adjacent enemies, with a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Burn the target and adjacent targets. When Burned, enemies will take a Fire DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Guinaifen's ATK at the beginning of each turn, lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
121002.simple_desc: Deals Fire DMG to one enemy and minor Fire DMG to adjacent enemies, with a high chance of <color=#f29e38ff>Burning</color> them.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

121003.name: Watch This Showstopper
121003.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Guinaifen's ATK to all enemies. If the target enemy is currently inflicted with Burn, then their Burn status immediately produces DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of their original DMG.
121003.simple_desc: Deals Fire DMG to all enemies. If the enemies are inflicted with Burn, the Burn status deals DMG 1 extra time.

121004.name: PatrAeon Benefits
121004.desc: When Guinaifen is on the field, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to apply Firekiss to an enemy after their Burn status causes DMG. While inflicted with Firekiss, the enemy receives <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> increased DMG, which lasts for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and can stack up to <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> time(s).
121004.simple_desc: After the <color=#f29e38ff>Burn status causes DMG</color> on the enemy, there is a high chance of applying <color=#f29e38ff>Firekiss</color> to the enemy.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

121006.name: Attack
121006.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

121007.name: Skill Showcase
121007.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals DMG for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s), dealing Fire DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Guinaifen's ATK to a random single enemy target each time, with a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting Firekiss on them.
121007.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy target with a high chance of applying <color=#f29e38ff>Firekiss</color>, with a total of 4 Bounces.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: Basic ATK has a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting an enemy with a Burn equivalent to that of Skill.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When the battle begins, Guinaifen's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1.point_desc: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to Burned enemies.
